story: FIFA gives Jarell Quansah two-game ban for red card, would miss England’s World Cup semi-final
title: Quansah Misses Semi
script: Jarell Quansah gets a two-game ban. This hurts England's World Cup chances as they head into the semi-final against a tough opponent. The punishment is raising eyebrows with former FIFA referees questioning the consistency of the decision, especially compared to other recent incidents. Quansah's absence will be deeply felt by the team, and it's a major setback for their championship hopes. Will England be able to overcome this loss and still make it to the final?
